Dashboard Archive: 2026-03-13 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Short-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns (1d to 1y), SMA gate (above 30/50/100/200 day), ratio consistency across timeframes, and resilience on bad SPY days. Higher composite scores indicate stronger, more consistent short-term momentum.
Today's Reading
Today's momentum ranker shows two exceptionally strong performers at the top of the 700+ ticker universe. LINC ranks #1 with a composite score of 96.1, posting balanced gains across all timeframes (1.64% daily to 148.95% yearly) while passing all SMA gates and maintaining 4 out of 5 ratio consistency checks; its 98.6 score on bad SPY days indicates it held up well during market weakness. PRE shows more extreme but volatile performance with a stunning 379.96% one-year return and 143.23% six-month gain, though its ratio data reveals significant inconsistency—notably a 0.03 ratio from 1-month to 1-week returns suggests a recent sharp deceleration after strong earlier moves. Both tickers pass all moving average filters and beat SPY and QQQ substantially across multiple timeframes, but LINC's higher ratio consistency (97.5 score) and steadier momentum signal (0.42, flagged "clean") suggest more sustainable near-term upside, while PRE's concentrated gains and lumpy ratios suggest caution around entry timing despite its eye-catching absolute returns.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
